rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., VS. ROGER C. KUHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joinder In Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 23, 2017, Line 1: ALL ANIMALS EMERGENCY HOSPITAL, INC. AND MICHAEL INA'S Joinder In DEFENDANT ROGER KUHN, RICHARD SAVAGE, SHERMAN WONG, ALL ANIMALS PROPERTIES, LP, and 1333 NINTH AVENUE, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Second Amended Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted without leave to amend as to the 5th cause of action (excess payment of interest). The issue of note repayment has been raised and adjudicated in the prior action. See Ass'n of Irritated Residents v. Dep't of Conservation (2017) 11 Cal. App. 5th 1202 and May 18, 2016 Judgment. Motion is granted with leave to amend as to the 2nd and 6th causes of action (re: referral agreement) for Plaintiff to allege all material terms of the referral agreement including but not limited to the length of term of the agreement. Plaintiff shall also allege facts regarding the time of the breach. Such allegations shall be made in good faith and in light of the allegations in paragraph 20 of the Second Amended Complaint asserting that the breaches began shorty after transaction closed, i.e. shortly after August 2012. Motion is DENIED as to the 1st, 3rd and 4th causes of action. These causes of action are not barred by rest judicata or collateral estoppel. At least partially the do not arise out of issues that were or should have been previously litigated. See Ass'n of Irritated Residents v. Dep't of Conservation (2017) 11 Cal. App. 5th 1202. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LPF YERBA BUENA, INC. VS. JOSEPHINE ANN QUILALA
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 23, 2017, Line 4: DEFENDANT JOSEPHINE QUILALA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile allegations in paragraphs 7 and 8 and Exhibit 3 regarding the service of Notice and to clarify who accomplished service and signed the Proof of Service under penalty of perjury, Julie Anderson, Eduardo Rivas, or both). Demurer is otherwise overruled. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint For Unlawful Detainer
